Original Requirement: WHILE VehSpd is within [0 kph, 250 kph], THE SYSTEM SHALL process the VehSpd value within [50 ms].

Original Requirement: IF VehSpd AliveCounter is unchanged for [3 consecutive cycles], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_ALC_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_ALC - transition to safe state.
Corrected Requirement: WHEN VehSpd AliveCounter remains unchanged for 3 consecutive cycles, THEN the system shall detect F_ALC_VehSpd within 10 ms.
